name: Insta360 X4 360° 8K Action Camera
description: Break into the world of cinematic 360° video with the compact Insta360 X4 360° 8K Camera, capable of capturing 8K30 360° video in dual or single-lens modes all in one portable action camera.

features.Key Features:: For Content Creators and Videographers | 8K30/5.7K60 360°Cinematic H.265 Video | 360° Post Reframing, Longer Runtime | Rugged Design, Removable Lens Guards | Gesture Control, Dual/Single Lens Modes | 5.7K120 Bullet Time, 11K Time-Lapse | FlowState Stabilization, Horizon Lock | 33' Waterproof, 72MP Photos | App with Edit Suite and Effects | Invisible Selfie Stick Feature
features.Standard Package: Insta360 X4 360° 8K Camera | 2 x Standard Lens Guard | 2290mAh Battery | Thermo Grip Cover | USB-C Charging Cable | Protective Pouch | Lens Cloth | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
features.Motorcycle: 1x Insta360 X4 | 1x Standard Lens Guard | 1x Insta360 MicroSD 128GB | 1x Heavy Duty Clamp Mount | 2x Flexible Adhesive Mount | 1x Clamp Mount Wrench | 1x 3-Prong to 1/4" Adapter | 2x 1/4" to 2-Prong Adapter | 3x Thumb Screw | 1x Hex Screw | 8x Anti Slip Ring | 1x Type-C to C Cable | 1x Ptotective Pouch | 1x Lens Cloth
features.Diving Bundle: Insta360 X4 360° 8K Camera | Standard Lens Guard | 2290mAh Battery | USB-C Charging Cable | Protective Pouch | Lens Cloth | Invisible Dive Case | Floating Hand Grip | Selfie Stick Wrist Strap | Lens Cap | Limited 1-Year Warranty
features.BMW Edition:: 1x Insta360 X4 BMW Motorrad Edition | 1x Standard Lens Guards | 1x Type-C to C Cable | 1x Protective Pouch | 1x Lens Cloth
